notes: Exercised end-to-end during development: FAA sync ingested 312,640 aircraft from registry.faa.gov, doctor reports schema_version=1, tail N628TS resolved to FALCON LANDING LLC's 2015 Gulfstream G650ER with Mode-S A835AF (verifiable against ADS-B Exchange). NTSB ingest covered by synthetic-CSV unit tests in internal/ingest/ntsb_test.go. flight-goat composition path verified with clear auth-hint error surfacing when FLIGHT_GOAT_API_KEY_AUTH is unset. FTS5 search smoke-tested with porter-stemmed snippets.
